reason: The single finding is a structural observation, not an information gap. All content from the 3 source sections is fully preserved in s1, and all key terms (テスト準備, テスト実施, DBダンプ, エビデンス収集, etc.) are covered by hints. An agent answering questions about 取引単体テスト procedures has everything it needs. The duplicate section in the RST is correctly deduplicated. For this small, sequential procedure, a single consolidated section is appropriate and does not degrade answer quality.

findings_assessment.justification: The consolidation of 3 short, sequential h2 sections into a single s1 is a valid design choice for small cohesive content. No information was lost: all procedural steps (DB preparation, deploy, server start, test execution, evidence collection), both notes, and all key terms appear in s1 and its hints. The RST duplicate of テスト結果エビデンスの収集 is correctly deduplicated. The Phase E agent returned the identical JSON because it concluded the current structure already serves users optimally — splitting ~200 characters of prose into 3 micro-sections would add structural overhead without any retrieval benefit.
